attempts.strategy: Build generic-M core tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core standalone (no LocalizedMonoidal/X.Modules comp-instance diamond present when M is a free var), then wire into succ branch via exact with M pinned to LocalizedMonoidal so isDefEq bridges the rfl-defeq diamond.
attempts.code_tried: private lemma tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core {M}[Category M][MonoidalCategory M] (...~17 bridge isos, 6 mu morphisms, foldhyp, hmu5...) : <canonical pentagon hom eqn> := by rw [hmu5]; have foldhyp' := (cancel_epi iABCL.inv).mp foldhyp; simp only [Category.assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc, whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc, inv_hom_whiskerRight_assoc]; rw [foldhyp']; simp only [...comp_whiskerRight, whiskerLeft_comp, hom_inv_whiskerRight_assoc, whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc]; rw [<- associator_inv_naturality_left_assoc]; simp only [whisker_assoc, whisker_exchange_assoc]; monoidal
attempts.goal_before: succ-case canonical pentagon residual (tensorObjIso bridges, mu-atom homs, alpha, whiskerings)
attempts.insight: monoidal ALONE stalls — cannot peel non-structural mu-atoms nor cancel opaque iso pairs; needs the explicit fold (foldhyp'=ihRh) + ONE associator_inv_naturality_left + whisker_exchange BEFORE monoidal. Staging into sub-lemmas (plan directive) was unnecessary — closes in one chain. exact's isDefEq crosses the comp-instance diamond that rw/simp/erw/hc-bridge all fail on.
